subject: Bed
body:
Dear Jeffrey,



It was nice talking to you this morning.
For the bedroom at the Library, that we are doing in the "Oranienbaum" style, I found this extraordinary 17th century Roman bed,in Rome, of course, "is the King's bed", it cost a fortune but we can reproduce it.Just an idea.
The Penthouse,(maid's room) at Av. Foch comes to a total of € 69.673,36, all included. (Bathroom,plumbing,kitchenette, electrical, air,heating, fabrics, furniture, etc.etc.)J.P.



 




[Photo retirée de l'e-mail]
